deleteAllAddrButton.description: Button to delete all emails from an address

deleteAllDomainButton.description: Button to delete all emails from a domain

deleteAllNameAddrButton.description: Button to delete all emails from a specific sender

deleteButton.description: Label for the delete button with a dropdown indicator

deleteOneButton.description: Button to delete only the current email

detailsTextEmail.message: When you click "Unsubscribe", an email will be drafted to the following address:

detailsTextPost.message: When you click "Unsubscribe", a post request will be sent to the following URL:

detailsTextWeb.message: When you click "Unsubscribe", a browser window will open and will visit the following URL:

detailsTextNone.description: Details for a when no method is available

extensionDescription.description: The description of the Thunderbird MailExtension
extensionDescription.message: Makes it easier to unsubscribe from mailing lists.

extensionName.description: The name of the Thunderbird MailExtension

statusTextDeleteError.description: Status text when email deletion fails

statusTextDeleteSuccess.description: Status text for successful email deletion

statusTextDeleting.description: Status text while email(s) are being deleted

unsubscribeQuestion.description: Text asking the user if they want to unsubscribe
unsubscribeQuestion.message: Would you like to unsubscribe from this mailing list?

autoSendEmailHelp.description: Help text for auto-send email option
autoSendEmailHelp.message: When disabled (default), a compose window will open for you to review before sending. When enabled, the unsubscribe email will be sent automatically without review.

confirmRulesDescription.message: Show a confirmation dialog before unsubscribing when the target URL or sender matches a pattern. The warning message you enter here will appear in that dialog, reminding you why you wanted to be careful about this category.

confirmRulesPatternCol.description: Column header for the regex pattern column in the rules list

confirmRulesWarningCol.description: Column header for the warning message column in the rules list

confirmRulesEmpty.description: Text shown when no confirmation rules are configured
confirmRulesEmpty.message: No rules. Confirmation dialogs are disabled.

addRuleButton.description: Button to add a new confirmation rule

confirmRulesHelp.description: Help text below the confirmation rules list
confirmRulesHelp.message: Patterns match against the unsubscribe URL and sender address.

settingsSaved.description: Message shown when settings are saved

settingsReset.description: Message shown when settings are reset

confirmUnsubscribeMessage.message: You are about to unsubscribe from:

confirmUnsubscribeWarning.description: Fallback warning in confirmation dialog when no custom message was set for the matched rule
confirmUnsubscribeWarning.message: This address matches one of your confirmation rules. Are you sure you want to continue?
